name: Onion Saffron Sweet Pea Relish with Orange Zest
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the onions and sprinkle with garlic salt. Set aside.
2. Prepare other ingredients.
3. Heat a small skillet or min-wok over medium heat.
4. Toast saffron threads until brittle for about 1 to 1½ minutes, crushing them slightly with the back of a spoon.
5. Add oil and garlic salt to the toasted saffron; add the onions and season with pepper.
6. Sauté the onions for about 4 minutes.
7. Add peas and continue to sauté until the onions are golden brown.
8. Reduce heat to lowest, add orange zest and juice.
9. Toss continuously until the relish cools slightly.
10. Serve as a relish with potatoes, pasta, or other vegetables (asparagus or cauliflower).
